data.body: 6168 v4 re-review (@da7f11fc0) completed with BLOCK: ACs 1&2 (sha256sum hash-gate + wheel/sdist test-job probes) need in-session static tests like 08a8's. Remediated: added AC extending test_release_workflow_pins.py with checks (g) sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS in publish + no-rebuild, (h) wheel-test/sdist-test jobs with named probes, (i) build-once single bundle w/ SHA256SUMS. Re-reviewing via harness-tracked background.
